bargaining_unit_name: Fraternal Order of Police, Lodge No. 5
binding_arbitration_statute: Pennsylvania Act 111 (43 P.S. Section 217.1 et seq.)
total_comp_note: AAA Case #01-25-0000-9827, Act 111 Interest Arbitration. Panel: Robert Gifford (neutral chair), Richard G. Poulson (FOP-appointed), Shannon Farmer (City-appointed). Term July 1 2025 - June 30 2027; 3.0% wage increases effective July 1 2025 and July 1 2026; retiree trust fund lump-sum payments; longevity schedule changes effective Jan 2026/2027.
